user.title: Room Setup
user.description: Configure the basic properties of the room.

presence_sensors.title: Presence Sensors
presence_sensors.description: mmWave sensors detect still persons and are strongly preferred over PIR. ESPresense sensors report the room name where a BLE device is currently detected.

data.person_count_sensors: Person Count Sensors (camera / people counter, numeric)

context_sensors.title: Context Sensors
context_sensors.description: These sensors provide supporting signals. None are required.

data.workstation_sensors: Workstation / PC (binary sensor or power sensor)

thresholds.title: Thresholds & Sleep Mode
thresholds.description: Hysteresis between occupied and clear threshold prevents flickering. Sleep mode raises the clear threshold when selected entities are on — making it harder to mark the room as clear.

data.sleep_mode_entities: Sleep Mode Entities (any on → reduced sensitivity)

llm.title: LLM Advisory
llm.description: Optional AI analysis. Disabled by default. Provider 'HA conversation agent' uses a configured agent (Gemini, OpenAI, Ollama, …). Provider 'Direct HTTP' calls any OpenAI-compatible chat-completions endpoint directly (e.g. MiniMax, model MiniMax-M3) — fill base URL, API key and model. Only activates when new sensor events are detected.

no_presence_sensors.title: No presence sensors in {room_name}
no_presence_sensors.description: Room "{room_name}" has no presence sensors (mmWave, PIR, ESPresense, or person-count) configured. The score can never reach the occupied threshold based on sensor signals alone — the room will always stay CLEAR. Open the room options and add at least one presence sensor.

has_door_no_sensor.title: Door lock-in disabled in {room_name}
has_door_no_sensor.description: Room "{room_name}" is marked as having a door, but no door contact sensor is configured. The door-closed lock-in feature (which keeps the room occupied while the door stays closed) requires at least one door contact. Open the room options and add a door contact under Context Sensors.

missing_entities.title: {count} configured sensor(s) missing in {room_name}
missing_entities.description: The following entities configured for room "{room_name}" do not exist in Home Assistant: {entities}. They may have been removed, renamed, or not yet loaded. Open the room options to update the sensor configuration.

data.person_count_sensors: Person Count Sensors (camera / people counter, numeric)
